ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "config_version" INTEGER /* Version of the configuration used */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning algorithm used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric of the model */,
  "balanced_accuracy" REAL /* Balanced accuracy metric of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score metric of the model */,
  "kappa" REAL /* Kappa score metric of the model */,
  "train_time" REAL /* Time taken for training in seconds */,
  "test_time" REAL /* Time taken for testing in seconds */,
  "algorithm_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the algorithm in seconds */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store hyperparameters used in the experiment */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path to the trained model file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_config_version FOREIGN KEY ("config_version") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public repository, internal data) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_label" INTEGER /* Whether the dataset is labeled or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_version" INTEGER /* Version of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "config_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the configuration file */,
  "config_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the configuration file for version control */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created or last updated */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_library" TEXT /* Library or framework used to implement the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_author" TEXT /* Author or developer of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_license" TEXT /* License under which the algorithm is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment for which the metric is recorded */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment for which the times are recorded */,
  "train_time" REAL /* Time taken for training in seconds */,
  "test_time" REAL /* Time taken for testing in seconds */,
  "algorithm_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the algorithm in seconds */,
  "preprocessing_time" REAL /* Time taken for data preprocessing */,
  "postprocessing_time" REAL /* Time taken for post-processing */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the entire experiment (including preprocessing and postprocessing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_times_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "researcher_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "researcher_status" TEXT /* Status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_researchers" (
  "experiment_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between experiment and researcher */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiment (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the researcher's contribution to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_researchers_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the dataset (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
